# services.wgautomesh

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.wgautomesh`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.wgautomesh.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the wgautomesh daemon. |
| `services.wgautomesh.enableGossipEncryption` | `boolean` | Enable encryption of gossip traffic. |
| `services.wgautomesh.enablePersistence` | `boolean` | Enable persistence of Wireguard peer info between restarts. |
| `services.wgautomesh.gossipSecretFile` | `absolute path` | File containing the gossip secret, a shared secret key to use for gossip encryption. Required if `enableGossipEncryption` is set. This file may contain any arbitrary-length utf8 string. To generate a new gossip secret, use a command such as `openssl rand -base64 32`. |
| `services.wgautomesh.logLevel` | `one of "trace", "debug", "info", "warn", "error"` | wgautomesh log level. |
| `services.wgautomesh.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Automatically open gossip port in firewall (recommended). |
| `services.wgautomesh.settings` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | Configuration for wgautomesh. |
| `services.wgautomesh.settings.gossip_port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | wgautomesh gossip port, this MUST be the same number on all nodes in the wgautomesh network. |
| `services.wgautomesh.settings.interface` | `string` | Wireguard interface to manage (it is NOT created by wgautomesh, you should use another NixOS option to create it such as `networking.wireguard.interfaces.wg0 = {...};`). |
| `services.wgautomesh.settings.lan_discovery` | `boolean` | Enable discovery of peers on the same LAN using UDP broadcast. |
| `services.wgautomesh.settings.peers` | `list of (submodule)` | wgautomesh peer list. |
| `services.wgautomesh.settings.peers.*.address` | `string` | Wireguard address of this peer (a single IP address, multiple addresses or address ranges are not supported). |
| `services.wgautomesh.settings.peers.*.endpoint` | `null or string` | Bootstrap endpoint for connecting to this Wireguard peer if no other address is known or none are working. |
| `services.wgautomesh.settings.peers.*.pubkey` | `string` | Wireguard public key of this peer. |
| `services.wgautomesh.settings.upnp_forward_external_port` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Public port number to try to redirect to this machine's Wireguard daemon using UPnP IGD. |
